# matomo_site (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "matomo_site" "existing" {
  name = "My Existing Website"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The site's numeric ID. Exactly one of id or name is required.
- `name` (String) The site's name. Exactly one of id or name is required.

### Read-Only

- `currency` (String)
- `timezone` (String)
